channel.title: MN on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in MN on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Sherburne County Sheriff’s Office (MN)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Sherburne County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: October 17, 2025 County: Sherburne County State: MN FIPS: 27141

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: AKIMA INFRASTRUCTURE PROTECTION LLC — ICE HENNEPIN, MN $836,493
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: AKIMA INFRASTRUCTURE PROTECTION LLC Award ID: 70CDCR24FG0000001 Amount: $836,492.80 Description: ST. PAUL GUARD SERVICES Period: 2024-09-30 to 2025-09-29 Location: HENNEPIN, MN (FIPS: 27053)

item.title: FEDERAL CARTRIDGE COMPANY — ICE ANOKA, MN $2,231,144
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: FEDERAL CARTRIDGE COMPANY Award ID: HSCEMD10J00116 Amount: $2,231,144.04 Description: AMMUNITION NEEDED FOR QUALIFICATIONS TRAINING, AND OPERATIONS. DISTRIBUTION LIST TO BE PROVIDED UPON LOT TEST SAMPLE APPROVAL. Period: 2010-06-02 to 2011-12-31 Location: ANOKA, MN (FIPS: 27003)

ICE contract.

item.title: RESPONSE AI SOLUTIONS, LLC — ICE HENNEPIN, MN $2,561,242
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: RESPONSE AI SOLUTIONS, LLC Award ID: 70CDCR26FR0000040 Amount: $2,561,242.44 Description: TASK ORDER TO PROCURE URGENT SERVICES AND SUPPLIES IN SUPPORT OF SURGE LAW ENFORCEMENT ACTIVITIES AT ST. PAUL AREA OF RESPONSIBILITY Period: 2026-02-09 to 2026-03-08 Location: HENNEPIN, MN (FIPS: 27053)

item.title: THE KINETIC GROUP SALES LLC — ICE ANOKA, MN $1,487,160
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: THE KINETIC GROUP SALES LLC Award ID: 70CMSW22FR0000073 Amount: $1,487,160.00 Description: PURCHASE OF 9MM LUGER +P 124 GRAIN AMMUNITION FOR OFTP Period: 2022-07-12 to 2023-04-07 Location: ANOKA, MN (FIPS: 27003)
